parameters.query:
SELECT
    p.id AS property_id,
    p.wp_post_id,
    p.name AS referencia,
    p.title AS titulo,
    p.description AS descripcion_detallada,
    p.price AS precio,
    p.area AS metros_cuadrados,
    p.bedrooms AS habitaciones,
    p.bathrooms AS banos,
    p.parking_spaces AS parqueaderos,
    p.year_built AS anio_construccion,
    p.floor AS piso_planta,
    t.name AS tipo_propiedad,
    p.street AS direccion,
    p.city AS ciudad,
    p.sector_keywords AS sectores_relacionados,
    p.tour_360_url AS link_tour_virtual,
    CASE
        WHEN p.wp_post_id IS NOT NULL AND p.wp_post_id > 0
        THEN 'https://inmobi.com.ec/?p=' || p.wp_post_id
        ELSE NULL
    END AS link_web
FROM estate_property p
LEFT JOIN estate_property_type t ON p.property_type_id = t.id
WHERE p.active = true
  AND (
    ({{ $json.id_propiedad }} > 0 AND (
      p.id = {{ $json.id_propiedad }}
      OR p.wp_post_id = {{ $json.id_propiedad }}
    ))
    OR
    ({{ $json.id_propiedad }} = 0 AND '{{ $json.busqueda }}' != '' AND (
      p.title  ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.busqueda }}' || '%'
      OR p.city   ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.busqueda }}' || '%'
      OR p.street ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.busqueda }}' || '%'
      OR COALESCE(p.sector_keywords,'') ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.busqueda }}' || '%'
    ))
    OR
    ({{ $json.id_propiedad }} = 0 AND '{{ $json.busqueda }}' = '' AND
      p.name ILIKE '%' || '{{ $json.id_propiedad }}' || '%'
    )
  )
ORDER BY p.state = 'available' DESC, p.id DESC
LIMIT 1;

assignments.name: response
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json)[0] || { error: 'Propiedad no encontrada' }, null, 2) }}
